leads.title: I'm Tom, I'm a local web developer and SEO specialist. ...
leads.snippet:
I'm Tom, I'm a local web developer and SEO specialist. ...

Facebook · Small Business Atlanta
7 hours ago
leads.full_content:
Hey everyone - I’m Tom, I’m a local web developer and SEO specialist.
I build websites and handle SEO for local service businesses, mostly contractors and home service companies. I’ve been in web design and development for about 6 years, and most of what I do is focused on getting sites to rank locally and turn visitors into actual phone calls. 
A lot of small businesses get stuck with slow template sites, no clear SEO structure, and zero strategy behind their website. Local SEO isn’t the same as national campaigns or ecommerce. It’s about intent, geography, internal structure, and making it easy for someone to call you immediately.
If you’re interested in learning more about how I can help you with your site, seo, optimization - please send a DM or leave a comment, let’s chat!

leads.full_content:
Hi everyone, 'Kokom' doppleganger here!
I’d like to share that my current company is undergoing a restructuring due to a slowdown in projects, and unfortunately, my role has been impacted as part of this retrenchment.
I’m currently serving my notice period (until May 2026), but I’m open to new opportunities and can be available earlier if needed.
I’m a Software Lead Engineer with experience in:
* JavaScript, Vue.js, PHP
* Building and maintaining production systems
* API integration and system migration (including versioning strategies)
* Leading features from development to deployment
* Domain experience in insurance digital platforms, supporting enterprise customer-facing applications and modernization initiatives.
I’m actively exploring roles in software engineering, preferably where I can contribute to impactful projects and continue growing technically.
If you know of any opportunities or would like to connect, I’d greatly appreciate it. By the way , feel free to comment any impro

We’re Hiring: Web Developer (Remote – Night Shift)

Company: Ray Advertising
Location: Remote (Work From Home – Bangladesh)
Working Hours: Monday–Saturday | 6:00 PM – 3:00 AM (BD Time)

About Us
Founded in 2019 in Redding, California, Ray Advertising is a global performance marketing agency specializing in Pay Per Call, affiliate marketing, and lead generation for major U.S. brands across insurance, home services, finance, legal, and more.

Role Overview
We’re looking for a skilled Web Developer with strong experience in Python and/or Node.js to join our remote engineering team. You’ll build scalable web applications, APIs, and high-converting marketing websites that support high-volume lead generation campaigns in the U.S. market.

Key Requirements
2–4 years of experience in backend or full-stack development
Strong skills in Python / Node.js, REST APIs, and backend architecture
Experience with PostgreSQL (MongoDB preferred)
Proficiency in Typescript, HTML5, CSS3, and Git
Familiarity

leads.title: Hi developers, I am a fresh grad with a software ...
leads.snippet:
Hi developers, I am a fresh grad with a software ...

Facebook · Developer Kaki
10 hours ago
leads.full_content:
Hi developers, I am a fresh grad with a software engineering degree that has been working around half a year with Martech (marketing  technology) eg:Salesforce for an agency with a lot of clients. I learned many things from SOQL and building Journeys to reporting. However I know my self as my passion leans towards the development side where my current aim later is to become Sales cloud platform developer. I'm not sure if I'm currently able to make the leap currently as a junior sales cloud platform developer or should I pay and take the certification for platform developer 1 first. Do give your opinions and advice on this especially those who are already working in this role. Thank you! 
Just some context within a few months I already got certified for another Martech platform but if I mention the certificate it might give away my identity to specific people working in the same company.

Infrastructure: Vercel, GitHub, Postman
I’m highly comfortable working remotely, owning features from ideation to deployment, and collaborating smoothly with wider teams.

leads.title: Junior wordpress developer job available in Greenville
leads.snippet:
Junior wordpress developer job available in Greenville

Facebook · All Things Greenville! (SC)
2 comments · 21 hours ago
leads.full_content:
NOW HIRING Junior WordPress Developer at Drastic Impact

Starting pay: $20-25/ hour
Location: Pleasantburg Dr. near E. North St.
Hours: flexible
Job Description:
We are seeking a capable WordPress developer to join our in-house team for either part-time or full-time work. This position will focus on WordPress development tasks, including the use of site editors/builders to update and edit existing websites, eventually leading to full site development. The ideal candidate needs to be flexible, organized, and detail-oriented. This is an entry-level position, so extensive work experience is optional, and familiarity with editing WordPress sites is a must.
About Us:
Drastic Impact is a dynamic and innovative full-service digital marketing and web development agency. We are passionate about growing our local economy by boosting local businesses' online presence through optimized site design and top-of-the-line marketing strategies.
Contact us here and tell us about your WordPress experience
